CustomField.description: If the applicant is living in substandard or overcrowded housing at the time of income certification, this field will show that they are eligible for a waiver (45%).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If the applicant is living in substandard or overcrowded housing at the time of income certification, this field will show that they are eligible for a waiver (45%).
CustomField.label: Substandard/Overcrowded Housing Waiver?
